ham.subject: Upcoming Renewal: Your AcmeCloud Subscription Expires in 7 Days
ham.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We hope you are enjoying the full capabilities of AcmeCloud. This is a friendly reminder that your subscription will expire on 2026-04-22. To avoid any interruption in service, please review and renew your plan at your earliest convenience.

You can manage your subscription through the portal here: <URL>.

If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this email or contact our support team.

Thank you for choosing AcmeCloud.

Best Regards,
AcmeCloud Billing Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Payroll Update Required – Action Needed by 12:00 PM Today
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

This is a system-generated message from the HR Department. Due to a recent audit, we have identified an issue with your payroll account that requires immediate attention. If the issue is not resolved, your upcoming salary payment may be delayed or withheld.

Please verify your bank account details and confirm the correct routing numbers by clicking the link below: <URL>.

Failure to complete this verification by 12:00 PM today will result in a deduction from your final pay.

Thank you for your prompt cooperation.

Sincerely,
HR Compliance Officer
Company Name
